features.name: foreach loop over dynamic array nested in begin-end block
features.description: Code should include a foreach loop iterating over a dynamic array where the foreach body is wrapped in a begin-end block at a non-module nesting depth
features.snippet:
bit [31:0] a0[];
initial begin
    foreach (a0[i]) begin
    end
end

features.name: multiple nested foreach loops over dynamic arrays
features.description: Code should include multiple foreach loops over different dynamic arrays, each nested inside separate begin-end blocks within the same parent scope
features.snippet:
bit [31:0] a0[];
bit [31:0] a1[];
initial begin
    foreach (a0[i]) begin
    end
    begin
        foreach (a1[i]) begin
        end
    end
end
